hero.description: A Fullstack Developer with 7 years of experience, including a strong 5-year foundation in Frontend architecture and 2 years of Fullstack development. I specialize in building end-to-end systems—bridging complex backend logic with pixel-perfect, high-performance UIs that drive real business value.
